overviewRequest.description: If specified, will return data for the Overview section of the Insights Dashboard.

departments.description: Departments for which Insights are requested.

dayRange.description: Time period for which Insights are requested.

minDaysFromNow.description: DEPRECATED - The number of days from now in the past to define upper boundary of time period.

maxDaysFromNow.description: DEPRECATED - The number of days from now in the past to define lower boundary of time period.

epochSeconds.description: Epoch seconds. Has precedence over daysFromNow.

daysFromNow.description: Number of days in the past, relative to the current date.

epochSeconds.description: Epoch seconds. Has precedence over daysFromNow.

daysFromNow.description: Number of days in the past, relative to the current date.

agentsRequest.title: AgentsInsightsV2Request

departments.description: Departments for which Insights are requested.

managerIds.description: Manager user IDs whose teams should be filtered for. Empty array means no filtering.

dayRange.description: Time period for which Insights are requested.

minDaysFromNow.description: DEPRECATED - The number of days from now in the past to define upper boundary of time period.

hostApplications.description: Host applications to filter by. Empty array means all host applications.

tools.description: MCP tools to filter by. Empty array means all tools.

servers.description: MCP servers to filter by. Empty array means all servers.

disablePerUserInsights.description: If true, suppresses the generation of per-user Insights in the response. Default is false.

body.description: Includes request parameters for insights requests.
